g.onclick: sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-core: error model, SPI interfaces, shared constants, Spring utilities, no container dependency')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-definition-model: DefinitionSet, TypeDefinition, FieldDefinition, ConstraintDefinition, all meta-model types')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-format-yaml: SnakeYAML SafeConstructor, parse into DefinitionSet, no runtime logic')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-format-json: Jackson ObjectMapper, parse into DefinitionSet')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-format-bpmn: JDK StAX, XXE disabled, DTD disabled, parse into DefinitionSet')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-codegen: generates DTOs, binders, validators, mappers, registries. Build-time only, no Spring runtime dependency')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-runtime: shared contracts, common utilities, shared abstractions ONLY. No binding logic, no object-mapping implementations.')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-runtime-binding: NodeCursor abstraction, binder dispatch, BindingResult, format-neutral traversal. Lower-level extraction layer.')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-runtime-objectmap: TwinObjectMapper, TwinUpdateMapper, TwinPatchMapper, Spring ConversionService. Higher-level typed mapping layer.')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-validation: generated schema validators, ValidationReport, path-aware errors, Spring Validator, JSR-380 bridge')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-gradle-plugin: Worker API, sourceSets registration, dry-run, CI-friendly')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-maven-plugin: generate-sources phase, AbstractMojo, validation-only goals')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-spring-boot-starter: AutoConfiguration, TwinMapperProperties, bean wiring, optional feature toggles')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-cli: lint, validate, dry-run codegen, inspect normalized model, Picocli Spring Boot integration')

g.text: Property-gated · default off · never primary path

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Detail annotation-heavy usage mode: twinmapper-annotations + twinmapper-annotation-processor, convenience only, definitions remain primary')
sendPrompt('Detail annotation-processor module for annotation-heavy mode')
sendPrompt('Detail twinmapper-runtime-compat: reflection helpers, migration helpers, legacy bridge, proxy-safe, never default classpath')

svg.text: Convention mapping · bounded discovery · alias/fallback · reflection compat · sample-to-def assistant
core → definition-model → format-* → codegen → runtime → binding → objectmap → validation → starter
codegen → gradle-plugin / maven-plugin / cli (build-time pipeline consumers, not runtime spine)
Build-time first · BPMN is authoring format not runtime engine
runtime-binding = lower-level extraction · runtime-objectmap = higher-level typed mapping
Plugins and CLI are consumption channels, not core platform modules
